message.thinking:
We need to respond with JSON array of 3 objects. Each object has "question": "Chapters" or "Description" or "Structure". The feedback: mention problems. "complies": true or false.

We examine the given text. The question:

1. Chapters: Does the text list the main sections of the thesis? The text does not list chapters. So fails.

2. Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? There's no sections. So fails.

3. Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? No. So fails.

Thus all three compliance false.

Provide feedback accordingly. JSON array. No extra commentary.
